body:
This PR removes the `RoquetEquationOfState` and `TEOS10` and adds a dependency to `SeawaterPolynomials`.

We need

- [x] remove the tests that depend on Roquet and TEOS10
- [x] test that we can time-step a model with a `SeawaterPolynomials.BoussinesqEquationOfState`
title: Transition to SeawaterPolynomials
